message:
feat(browser): Add QueryPlanner with filter pushdown and JOIN optimization

- Implement QueryPlanner class for optimized multi-table query execution
- Add filter pushdown to push WHERE conditions to individual tables
- Add column pruning to only fetch columns needed for result
- Fix JOIN alias parsing to correctly capture table aliases
- Refactor LanceDatabase._hashJoin to use QueryPlanner
- Add projection support for selecting specific columns from join results
